title: A garden
content:
We have a little garden,
            A garden of our own,
    And every day we water there
            The seeds that we have sown.

    We love our little garden,
            And tend it with such care,
    You will not find a faded leaf
            Or blighted blossom there.
meaning: About: Helen Beatrix Potter was an English author, illustrator, mycologist and conservationist who was best known for her many best-selling children's books that featured animal characters, such as Peter Rabbit.
